name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the agent infrastructure, skills, or pipeline

labels: bug

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.5]
- Browser (if relevant): [e.g. Chrome 126, Safari 17]
- OpenCode version (if relevant): [e.g. 1.2.0]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.12.0]

## Detection Method

- [ ] Found by the Playwright test pipeline
- [ ] Found manually

## Affected Area

- [ ] Agent prompt / behavior (`.opencode/agents/`)
- [ ] Skill enforcement (`.opencode/skills/`)
- [ ] Pipeline / orchestration (`AGENTS.md`)
- [ ] MCP server configuration (`opencode.json`)
- [ ] Tooling / permissions
- [ ] Testing infrastructure
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Additional Context

Any other context, logs, or references.
